seo.title: Websiteli - Swiss Websites, Automation and AI for Small Businesses
seo.description: Swiss-based digital setup packages for small businesses: modern websites, analytics, lead capture, ads setup, automation and practical AI upgrades.

hero.title: Websites, automation and AI tools for small businesses that want to move faster.
hero.text: Websiteli builds complete digital setup packages for international small businesses, startups, freelancers and service providers who need a professional online presence without building an internal IT team.
hero.trustLine: Swiss-based - AI and data engineering expertise - Multilingual support

intro: We do not sell just websites. We set up the digital basics your business needs to look professional, get leads, understand traffic and grow into automation.

packagesIntro.title: Choose the right digital setup for your next stage.
packagesIntro.text: Start with a professional foundation, add growth systems, then upgrade repetitive work with AI and data tools.

packages.name: Digital Foundation
packages.description: For businesses that need a professional online presence without unnecessary complexity.

packages.name: Growth Setup
packages.description: For businesses that already have some online presence but want more leads, bookings and visibility.

packages.name: AI/Data Upgrade
packages.description: For businesses that want to save time, automate repetitive work and understand their data better.

services.title: Every service maps back to a clear business outcome.
services.text: We keep the offer simple so your project does not turn into an endless list of disconnected tasks.

items.title: Professional online presence
items.description: Website, domain email, mobile optimization, contact forms and SEO basics through Digital Foundation.

items.title: Lead and booking setup
items.description: Booking flows, lead capture, Google Business Profile, newsletter setup and conversion basics through Growth Setup.

items.title: Advertising readiness
items.description: Meta and Google Ads account setup with practical tracking foundations through Growth Setup.

items.title: Automation and AI
items.description: Chatbots, internal assistants, dashboards, reporting and workflow automation through AI/Data Upgrade.

demos.title: Demo projects for common small-business needs.
demos.text: Use these examples to see how a package can become a practical customer journey.

items.title: Restaurant/cafe website
items.description: Menu, location, booking request, Google profile basics and mobile-first contact actions.

items.title: Professional services website
items.description: Credible service pages, lead form, analytics, search setup and conversion-focused structure.

items.title: AI chatbot/data dashboard
items.description: FAQ assistant, lead qualification, analytics dashboard and recurring report automation.

caseStudies.title: Case study placeholders ready for real client work.
caseStudies.text: These project formats will later become detailed proof pages with goals, scope, timeline and outcomes.

about.title: A lean Swiss-based agency run by two technical founders.
about.text: Websiteli is built by a Hungarian and a Polish founder based in Switzerland. We combine software engineering, data and AI skills with practical small-business execution: clear scope, fast implementation and a handover you can actually use.

outreach.headline: A faster digital setup for small businesses ready to look professional.
outreach.pitch: We help international small businesses launch or improve the practical systems behind a modern online presence.
painPoints: Your website does not clearly convert visitors into leads.
Analytics and search tools are missing or confusing.
Manual admin work slows down customer follow-up.
benefits: Launch with website, email, analytics and search basics connected.
Add booking, lead capture and ad accounts when growth matters.
Upgrade repetitive work with practical AI and dashboards.
outreach.emailSubject: Quick digital setup idea for your business
outreach.emailDraft: Hi, I noticed your business could benefit from a clearer digital setup: website, contact flow, analytics and lead capture working together. Websiteli is a Swiss-based team helping small businesses launch these foundations quickly, then add automation when useful. Would you like a short free digital audit?

contact.title: Tell us what you want to improve.
contact.text: Request a free digital audit or ask for a setup plan. We will reply with practical next steps.
